title: ADTC Evaluation Item
description: Schema for a single evaluation item in an LLM benchmarking dataset.

id.description: Globally unique identifier for this evaluation item. Format: <domain>-<category>-<sequence> (e.g. coding-assistants-algorithms-001).

subcategory.description: Optional finer-grained classification within the category.

difficulty.description: Relative difficulty level of the question.

question.description: The prompt or question presented to the LLM.

expected_answer.description: Reference answer or expected output. May be a short answer, code snippet, or explanation.

criterion.description: A single scoring criterion the answer should satisfy.

weight.description: Relative importance of this criterion (0-1). Weights across all criteria should sum to 1.0.

required.description: If true, the answer MUST satisfy this criterion to receive any credit.

rubric.description: Scoring rubric: a list of weighted criteria for automated or manual evaluation.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping (e.g. 'recursion', 'big-o', 'python').

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the question and answer (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'sw').

notes.description: Internal notes for dataset maintainers. Not shown to the LLM.

document.description: Original document name or path (if sourced from a document).

page.description: Page number in the source document (if applicable).

url.description: URL of the source material (if sourced from the web).

source.description: Provenance metadata: where this evaluation item came from.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value store for domain-specific or future use. Keys must be strings; values can be any JSON type.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this item was created.

version.description: Schema version of this item. Increment on breaking changes.
